examples: Then they all set out for the Maidan .
Another day I had gone to the Maidan in Calcutta for fresh air.
The very famous international Trade Fair and also other international exhibitions are displayed at the Pragati Maidan of the New Delhi.
For breakfast, stop into Passage, an alley off the small, glitzy street, Khreschatyk, right before you hit Maidan Nezalezhnosti, or Independence Square.
